title: 3 x Original Oasis Renewal Floral Foam Based on Plant-Based Bio-Based Raw Materials - 23 x 11 x 7.5 cm - Flower Wet Foam Wedding Birthday Church Brick Environmentally Friendly
features: Environmentally friendly: OASIS Renewal Floral Foam is based on plant-based, bio-based raw materials and is certified by TÜV Austria with 4 stars according to OK biobased 80+. The OASIS Renewal Floral Foam has a 56% reduced carbon footprint compared to petroleum-based OASIS plug-in foams. This not only protects precious resources, but is also particularly good for our environment.
Excellent water retention properties: the floral foam absorbs up to 2 litres of water per brick during the watering process.
Long-lasting freshness: the pH value of the new OASIS Renewal floral foam is in the ideal range, ensures optimal flower health and ensures long-lasting freshness.
Versatile - A floral foam for all types of flowers: suitable for soft and hard flower stems
Hassle-free processing: can be easily cut in wet and dry condition. Once wet, it has a deep, rich, black colour
description: Discover our innovative and environmentally friendly floral foam based on plant raw materials. Oasis Renewal Floral Foam is suitable for all types of arrangements and flowers - it gives both soft and hollow, as well as thick and woody stems a firm and secure hold. It has the same outstanding properties as our classic Oasis floral foam. OASIS Renewal Floral Foam contains no fragrances or dyes. Once wet, it has a deep, rich, black colour. Developed with a focus on sustainability - 56% lower carbon footprint. OASIS Renewal Floral Foam is not made from petroleum-based resins, but from plant and renewable raw materials. Certified according to OK biobased by TÜV Austria, as one of the world-renowned independent certification bodies, with the highest rating of 4 stars. The new OASIS Renewal Floral Foam has a 56% reduced carbon footprint compared to petroleum-based OASIS plug-in foams. This not only protects precious resources, but is also particularly good for the environment. Outstanding quality for long freshness and durability – Oasis Renewal Floral Foam has the same properties as our proven OASIS floral foam. The floral foam absorbs up to 2 litres of water per brick during the watering process. Can be easily cut and shaped when wet and dry. Excellent water retention properties. Holds all types of flowers firmly and securely in the floral foam. The pH value of the OASIS Renewal floral foam is in the ideal range, ensures optimal flower health and ensures long-lasting freshness. In addition, the moulding material is free from dyes and dyes and, like the other OASIS Floral foam foams, completely non-toxic.
